title: My Moa
description: A redesign of aether's moa model, using entity model features.
body:
**Stylized new look for the moa**
Made to suit my own tastes, and no one else's. Also based off of the (as of writing) yet to be produced plush. And my own insomnia.

Haven't made any of the donator skins (yet...? don't count on it.) because I couldn't be bothered. Maybe one day.

**This pack ONLY changes aechor, moa, and cockatrice entity models and textures. Nothing else.**
